leadText: Water Gun (Japanese: みずでっぽう Water Gun) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation I. It is TM12 in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Water Gun inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. Water Gun can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 4 bonus appeal points if Mud Sport , Rain Dance , or Water Sport was used in the previous turn. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Special Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 40 48 Cooldown 6s Move wind-up time 20 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Stad2 A Water -type attack. Stronger than Bubble . Many Water -type Pok é mon learn this move. G S C Squirts water to attack. R S E Squirts water to attack the foe. Colo XD Squirts water to attack the target. FR LG The foe is struck with a lot of water expelled forcibly from the mouth. D P Pt HG SS PBR The foe is blasted with a forceful shot of water. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water. ZA The user attacks by blasting targets with a forceful shot of water.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる Conq. The enemy is blasted with a forceful shot of water. MD GtI It damages an enemy. S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It reaches up to 2 tiles away. Pokopia Blasts a shot of water in front of you, moistening dry or withered things. This move can also put out fires.
